section by section with the summary at the top, because I think sometimes it can get long and you can kind of lose the insights when it comes to like too many charts.

They may be like the wrong stage of the funnel of content for the people you want to reach.

So I think like if they're not being reflected in traffic or if it feels like, you know, the numbers you're seeing aren't realistic in relation to your competition, I think making sure we're continuing to update those prompts on a regular basis is important as well.
